generation_rule: Generate the complete emission, propagation, observation-time, source/response, provenance, target-access, successor and extra-rule product.
grammar_boundary: All finite cosmological-boundary forms generated from exact source-bound propagation, recurrence ratios, causal paths and observation records; astronomical census and historical initial conditions remain outside this Physics closure.
